name: Emissions Sankey
description: A left-to-right Sankey diagram visualising the flow of greenhouse gas emissions from sources, through scope categories, to a final total footprint with target markers.

scope-view.description: Flows grouped by GHG Protocol scopes (Scope 1/2/3) feeding into a single total tCO2e node with target reduction marker overlay

supply-chain.description: Source-to-product-to-customer flow showing emissions moving through suppliers, manufacturing processes, and into finished goods delivered to customers

reduction.description: Emphasises reduction outflows rendered in green against baseline red flows, visualising abatement levers and residual emissions against net-zero target

visual_brief: A wide, left-to-right Sankey diagram rendered on a light-neutral canvas. On the far left, a stack of source nodes (Suppliers, Operations, Travel, Energy, Waste) appear as rounded rectangles labelled with monospace tCO2e values. Curved bezier flow paths fan rightward into a central column of emission category nodes (Scope 1 deep red #B22222, Scope 2 burnt orange #D97706, Scope 3 amber yellow #F59E0B) where flow width is proportional to tonnage. Reduction flows appear as inward green (#16A34A) ribbons pointing backwards. A horizontal dashed target marker line crosses the total node on the right indicating the net-zero goal with a small flag label. Hovering any flow path reveals a tooltip with absolute tCO2e, percentage of total, and source-to-category pair. Legend box in the bottom-right lists scope colors with descriptions. Subtle grid lines in the background provide scale reference.

layout_hints.note: Full-width horizontal Sankey. Min-height 480px. Flow paths must use SVG with bezier curves and animated dash-offset on hover.
layout_hints.data_labels: All tonnage values MUST appear with units (tCO2e) in monospace. Percentages shown to 1 decimal place.
layout_hints.color_semantics: Scope 1 = deep red, Scope 2 = orange, Scope 3 = yellow, reductions = green. Never reverse these semantics.

slots.sankey-canvas: The full SVG viewport rendering source nodes, flow paths, and category nodes. Uses a responsive viewBox that scales path widths proportionally to tonnage values. Background is subtle neutral with optional grid.
slots.source-node: Repeating slot for each emission source on the left edge. Rounded rectangle (width 140px, variable height based on emission magnitude) with source name in sans-serif and tCO2e in monospace below.
slots.flow-path: SVG cubic bezier path connecting a source-node to a category-node. Path width encodes tCO2e volume. Fill uses gradient from source color to category color. Hover state raises opacity and shows tooltip.
slots.category-node: Center-column scope category rectangles (Scope 1/2/3). Colored according to scope semantics. Display category name, total tonnage, and percent of company total.
slots.target-marker: Dashed horizontal line overlaid on the rightmost total node. Includes a small flag label with target year and reduction percentage (e.g. '2030 -50%').
slots.legend-box: Bottom-right anchored panel listing scope colors, reduction color, and unit definitions. Uses backdrop-blur with thin border.

accessibility.aria-label: Greenhouse gas emissions Sankey diagram showing flows from sources through scopes to total footprint
announcements: Flow from {source} to {category}: {value} tCO2e ({percent} of total)
keyboard: Tab: cycle through source nodes, then flow paths, then category nodes
Enter: open detail tooltip for focused element

responsive.mobile: Sankey rotates to vertical top-to-bottom flow. Flow labels hidden by default, accessible on tap. Legend collapses to expandable disclosure.
responsive.tablet: Horizontal Sankey retained but reduces source node count (merges smaller sources into 'Other'). Legend docks to bottom edge.

ambient.flow-pulse: subtle dash-offset drift 8s linear infinite on active flows

composition.EmissionsSankey: Section(d-section) > SankeyCanvas > [SourceNode[] + FlowPath[](animated) + CategoryNode[] + TargetMarker] + LegendBox
